title: DragonScales Modpack
description: A Modded Medival Vanilla like Modpack built for a Friends SMP or content creator server.
body:
A Modded Medieval Vanilla like Modpack

Built for a Friends SMP or content creator server

This is meant for a SMP or Singleplayer! (Also for low end PCs)

-- ALL CREDIT GOES TO ORIGINAL CREATORS - I DO NOT OWN THESE MODS --

A medieval fantasy adventure built around dragons, discovery, and survival.

DragonScales combines the thrill of Ice and Fire’s mythical creatures with a carefully balanced set of medieval and exploration mods.
It’s designed for players who want a rich fantasy experience without sacrificing performance — perfect for both SMP servers and solo adventures.

Preview Ice and Fire Mod
